title: gypsophila neoszovitsiana
intro: Gypsophila neoszovitsiana, also known as Neoszovits' gypsophila or Szovits' baby's breath, is a flowering plant species in the family Caryophyllaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. Gypsophila neoszovitsiana is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Herbal preparations of Gypsophila neoszovitsiana are typically made from the plant's flowers and leaves, and can be consumed as teas, infusions, or supplements.
